rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in valid component type scopes when referring to component ports.
Use annex agree {** ... **}; blocks for AGREE contract syntax.
generic_rules: Component type annexes are the standard location for assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equation declarations.
Implementation-level bindings should be placed in implementation scopes after relevant subcomponents and connections.
Align helper declaration types with the actual expression types (bool, int, real).
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in annex agree {** ... **}; blocks.
Do not use subcomponent ports directly in component type contracts unless represented through valid variables or outputs.
anti_patterns: Do not assume numeric bounds unless explicitly stated in the requirement.
Do not convert Boolean domain values into integers unless the port is an AGREE bool in scope.
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations as AGREE variables
